name: Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited
summary: Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited engages in the manufacture, supply, distribution, and export of automotive components for two/three/four wheeler automobiles in India and internationally. It offers pistons, piston rings, and wet and dry cylinder liners for a range of applications, including bi-wheelers, cars, SUVs, tractors, light and heavy commercial vehicles, stationary engines, and output locomotive diesel engines. The company also provides light metal castings comprising cylinder blocks; cylinder heads for single cylinder engines; and aluminum tube castings and aluminum crown handles for motorcycles. In addition, it offers sintered metal products comprising valve train parts, transmission parts, lubrication pump parts, and other engine and structural parts. The company was formerly known as Goetze (India) Limited and changed its name to Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited in 2006. The company was founded in 1954 and is based in Gurugram, India. Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited is a subsidiary of Federal Mogul Holdings Limited.
